title: Flavorful Charred Ethiopian Beef Kitfo
description: A charred, light, and cozy Ethiopian dish featuring tender beef, Bramley apples, and a hint of sweetness, all while being low-carb-friendly. This kitfo recipe brings together the bold flavors of Ethiopia in a single, delicious dish.
instructions: Preheat a skillet or grill pan over high heat, adding a small amount of olive oil to prevent sticking.
Add the chopped beef to the preheated pan, searing for 2-3 minutes per side, or until a nice char forms.
Remove the beef from the pan, setting it aside to rest.
In the same pan, add the sliced candy onions, cooking for 5 minutes, or until they are translucent and lightly caramelized.
Add the diced Bramley apples to the pan, cooking for an additional 2 minutes, or until they begin to soften.
Add the mitmita spice, garlic, and ginger to the pan, stirring to combine and cooking for 1 minute.
Return the seared beef to the pan, stirring to combine with the onion and apple mixture.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the top of the beef mixture, stirring to combine.
Season with salt to taste, then serve immediately.
Garnish with additional mitmita spice and lemon wedges, if desired.
